title: MRC Statewide Rehabilitation Council (SRC) Annual Report FY2022
description: Annual report of the Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission Statewide Rehabilitation Council (SRC) for fiscal year 2022 (July 1, 2021 – June 30, 2022). The SRC is the federally mandated advisory body to MRC's Vocational Rehabilitation (VR) division; this report reviews VR program outcomes and presents the council's committee reports and recommendations. Prose report converted to Markdown.

source.title: MRC Statewide Rehabilitation Council Annual Report 2022
